_comment: Manual overrides for Hybrid Memory ingestion. Each entry pinpoints one (source_node_id, target_node_id) edge from graph.json and forces its tier, half_life, and category, regardless of the validator's automatic verdict. Used to protect permanent core contracts from decay and from graph.json noise. Override hits are logged in infer_edges.py and appear in inferred_summary.json's override_hits count.

_how_to_add.1: Run 'python3 /tmp/final_picks.py' (or write a similar one-liner) to find god-nodes and their top edges by recall_score.
_how_to_add.2: Copy the (source_node_id, target_node_id) pair into the overrides list below.
_how_to_add.3: Choose tier (T1=permanent, T2=long-lived, T3=audit-only), half_life in days, category, and a short reason.

overrides.reason: Core metrics contract used by every scheduler path; manually verified as permanent
overrides.author: asurdev

overrides.reason: Telemetry event write contract — every state transition emits an event; permanent
overrides.author: asurdev

overrides.reason: Core policy contract: latency SLA enforcement is non-negotiable for all AstroFin policies
overrides.author: asurdev

overrides.reason: Main entry point contract: lccp_v12 always verifies state after rebuild
overrides.author: asurdev

overrides.reason: WireGuard health-check → reconnect contract; critical for tunnel reliability
overrides.author: asurdev

overrides.reason: Meta-RL evolve→reproduce contract; core of the AMRE self-improvement loop
overrides.author: asurdev

overrides.reason: Failure-orchestrator reboot must always invoke the run dispatcher; safety-critical invariant
overrides.author: asurdev
